caller-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17 to enable compilation for the new JDK version.
caller-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 11 language features, failing to utilize or enforce Java 17 syntax and potentially causing incompatibilities with libraries requiring Java 17.

caller-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 17.
caller-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Lombok may fail to compile or run correctly on Java 17 due to internal API changes or lack of support for newer bytecode versions.

person-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17.
person-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 17 if source/target remain at 11.
Runtime or build-time checks relying on java.version may fail or behave incorrectly if not updated to match the target JDK.

person-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 17.
person-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on JDK 17 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17 to align with the target JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 15 language features and bytecode, which may fail to utilize Java 17 features or cause compatibility issues if the runtime environment enforces strict version matching.
